nasb.text: and returned from the tomb and reported all these things to the eleven and to all the rest.

esv.text: and returning from the tomb they told all these things to the eleven and to all the rest.

cnv.text: 於是從墳地回去，把這一切事告訴十一個使徒和其餘的人。

ccb.text: 便离开墓地回去把事情的经过告诉十一个使徒和其他人。

csbs.text: 于是从墓穴回去，把这一切都告诉了那十一个使徒和所有其他的人。
